name: Harry Potter and the Cursed Child
TEDxHarlem: A State of Mind
description: TEDxHarlem is an independently organized TEDx experience that brings together influential leaders, innovators, artists, entrepreneurs, educators, and changemakers to share ideas that inspire action and expand perspectives. Rooted in the rich cultural legacy and global influence of Harlem, TEDxHarlem creates a platform for powerful storytelling, thought leadership, and community engagement across business, technology, education, culture, social impact, and the arts. The event features dynamic TED-style talks, live performances, and immersive audience experiences designed to spark meaningful conversation and connection. TEDxHarlem attracts a diverse audience of professionals, students, creatives, executives, and community leaders from across New York City and beyond. Through compelling programming and strategic partnerships, TEDxHarlem continues to elevate voices and ideas shaping the future of our communities and the world.
